justification: The diff updates Java version to 21 and uses `getFirst()` (Java 21 idiom), but fails to migrate Jakarta EE imports in `Raspberry_Controller.java` (still uses `jakarta.ws.rs` and old Apache HttpClient imports instead of the updated `org.apache.hc` packages). The pom.xml updates are mostly correct but leave some inconsistencies (e.g., mixing old/new Jersey versions). The diff is coherent but incomplete in dependency migration.
